landing.headline: Professional references and documents, verified.
landing.subline: Collect, verify, sign, and share professional references for work, immigration, visas, education, and clients.
landing.regionNote: Your data stays in the region you choose.

login.title: Sign in to Verifolio
login.sent: If this email has an account, a sign-in link is on its way. The link is valid for 15 minutes.

callback.invalidTitle: This sign-in link is invalid or has expired
callback.invalidBody: Sign-in links are single-use and expire after 15 minutes. Request a new one below.

contacts.title: Recommenders
contacts.subtitle: Contacts are stored with their consent — anyone can ask for removal.
contacts.name: Name

profile.title: Profile
profile.legalNameHint: Optional. Used to match your name on formal documents.

requests.title: Requests
requests.empty: No requests yet. Create your first one — it usually takes 2–3 days to collect a confirmed reference.

builder.title: New reference request
builder.templateHint: The template asks the right questions for your goal.
builder.contextHint: Context helps the recommender write a relevant letter.
builder.purposePlaceholder: e.g. International hiring — role, company, period…
builder.purposeVisibility: Only the recommender sees this — it helps them write an appropriate letter.
builder.recommenderHint: Pick from your contacts or add a new one.
builder.attestation: I confirm the recommender gave me verbal consent to receive this request.
builder.attestationHint: This attestation is recorded. The invitation cannot be created without it.

terminal.DECLINED: The recommender declined this request. Reminders have stopped and their data is scheduled for erasure.
terminal.EXPIRED: This request expired. The invitation link no longer works.
terminal.CANCELLED: You cancelled this request. The invitation link no longer works.

review.title: Response received — review it
review.hint: The recommender submitted their response. Accept it to generate and lock the document, or ask for a correction. The full letter becomes available in the locked document after acceptance.
review.correctionHint: The recommender will get a new secure link. Your note is sent in the email and is not stored.
review.generatingHint: Generating the PDF, calculating the hash, and locking the version. This usually takes less than a minute.
review.generatedHint: Verification signals are recorded. You can now share the document with a secure link.

errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.CONSENT_REQUIRED: This step requires your explicit confirmation.
errors.CODE_INVALID: That code is not valid. Check the code and try again.
errors.CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED: Please confirm the required checkboxes before submitting.
errors.CONTACT_IN_USE: This contact is referenced by a reference request and cannot be deleted.
errors.INVALID_REQUEST_STATE: This action is not available in the request's current state.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Some fields are invalid. Please review and try again.
errors.NOT_FOUND: Not found. It may have been removed or the link may have expired.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have access to this.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED: Your session has ended. Please sign in again.
errors.PROFILE_ERROR: Your profile could not be updated.
errors.UNKNOWN: Something went wrong ({code}). Please try again.
